arts.ttl: Haaland, the most valuable footballer in the world in 2024
arts.sum: Transfermarkt, the website specializing in statistics and movements in the football market, has updated Erling Haaland’s market value - the Manchester City striker is now the most valuable footballer in the world with an estimate of 200 million euros ($221.5 million) . The Norwegian becomes just the second player to reach that figure - Kylian Mbappé, Real Madrid’s new No.9, hit the same value in December 2018 when he was still at PSG.

arts.sum: Real Madrid face Lille in their first Champions League away game of the season on Wednesday night, as they are hosted at the Stade Pierre Mauroy for the first time ever. arts.ttl: Leny Yoro gave Real Madrid two reasons for joining Manchester United instead
arts.sum: Real Madrid will face Lille this evening in the Champions League, with whom they were locked in negotiations during the summer. Unusually for Real Madrid though, they did not get their man, as Leny Yoro moved to Manchester United for a fee of €62m.
